title: What If HAnno Dies Before 3010 Movie is Out
display_title: What If HAnno Dies Before 3010 Movie is Out
wikitext:
[]: What If H.Anno Dies Before 3.0+1.0 Movie is Out? Post by Shakivara777 » Fri Nov 13, 2015 6:55 am Don't Worry My Quest For Dragon Balls Has began!

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Nov 13, 2015 7:00 am By the off chance he does, then someone else (most likley Tsurumaki or Masayuki) will direct the rest of the movie for him

[]: Post by esselfortium » Fri Nov 13, 2015 9:38 am As long as you believe in yourself and in basic mathematics, you can find the answer to 3.0+1.0 without Anno-sempai's guidance. I have faith in you, Shakivara777.

[]: Re: What If H.Anno Die's Before 3.0+1.0 Movie is Out? Post by xPearse » Fri Nov 13, 2015 9:55 am The world would be a much better place.

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Nov 13, 2015 10:24 am I somewhat doubt that

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Fri Nov 13, 2015 10:36 am Arcadia's legacy wrote: By the off chance he does, then someone else (most likley Tsurumaki or Masayuki) will direct the rest of the movie for him

[]: Post by unz » Fri Nov 13, 2015 11:31 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: People need to start remembering Mahiro Maeda is on board now too.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Nov 13, 2015 12:04 pm Nope. Not thinking about this. Not at all. NOPE!  SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: What If H.Anno Die's Before 3.0+1.0 Movie is Out? Post by Merkaba » Fri Nov 13, 2015 1:38 pm xPearse wrote: The world would be a much better place.

[]: Post by Gob Hobblin » Fri Nov 13, 2015 1:42 pm If Anno dies before.... ...you know something the rest of us don't?

[]: Post by Ray » Fri Nov 13, 2015 2:12 pm Anno's not that old, and he's not suffering from a disease like poor Satoshi Kon did. You're worrying over nothing in that regard. Now, worrying over whether or not 3.0+1.0/Final/4.0 will be any good after the events of 3.0 destroying most of the good things about the first two movies? That's what you should be worrying about.

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Nov 13, 2015 2:22 pm I'm not worrying about that at all, for i don't consider anything of the previous two films destroyed

[]: Re: What If H.Anno Die's Before 3.0+1.0 Movie is Out? Post by Bagheera » Fri Nov 13, 2015 2:28 pm xPearse wrote: The world would be a much better place.

[]: Post by Chuckman » Fri Nov 13, 2015 2:39 pm Sometimes I hope I never get super super successful because it leads to people saying shit like this.

[]: Post by Ray » Fri Nov 13, 2015 2:40 pm Isn't it sad that we're so selfish? We're not concerned about Anno as a human being dying, we're concerned about his creations not being completed. A 'what have you done for me?" mentality.

[]: Post by Arcadia's legacy » Fri Nov 13, 2015 2:42 pm Humans like to have closure, it's natural

[]: Post by esselfortium » Fri Nov 13, 2015 2:44 pm Chuckman wrote: Sometimes I hope I never get super super successful because it leads to people saying shit like this.

[]: Post by Iuvenal » Fri Nov 13, 2015 3:02 pm Chuckman wrote: Sometimes I hope I never get super super successful because it leads to people saying shit like this.

[]: Post by BlueBasilisk » Fri Nov 13, 2015 3:03 pm It would be a tragedy if Anno were to pass away, but I have no doubt that the rest of his creative team would be able to finish the movie in accordance with his vision. He's worked with some of them for years .

[]: Post by Bagheera » Fri Nov 13, 2015 3:08 pm Suppressing my ire for a moment: If Anno died before finishing the final film of the NTE series, I'd feel bad for him. I don't really care about the NTE series myself, but it's clear he had something to say when making it, and it would be sad if he never got the chance to bring his vision to the world. And so, I hope he gets the chance to say what he has to say. If he's denied that chance for whatever reason I hope someone else can bring it to light, both for his sake and for ours.
